candidates.why: Direct match for total current assets on the balance sheet.
Current asset component only, not total.
Component of other current assets, not total current assets.

variables.notes: Selected the explicit total current assets line.

candidates.why: Direct balance sheet cash and cash equivalents line.
Cash-related but appears as a component/alternative presentation, not the preferred consolidated cash line.

candidates.row_label: Cash and Cash Equivalents at End of Period
candidates.why: Cash flow statement ending balance matches balance sheet cash, but balance sheet is preferred for CHE.

variables.notes: Used the balance sheet cash line as preferred.

candidates.why: Direct match for total current liabilities.
Only one component of current liabilities.
Debt-related current liability component only, not total.

variables.notes: Selected the explicit current liabilities total.

candidates.why: Best balance sheet match for short-term interest-bearing debt/current borrowings; excludes lease liabilities and appears to be the clean current debt total.
Conceptually relevant but no visible values; less preferable than explicit current interest-bearing liabilities.

candidates.row_label: Current Portion of LT Debt/Capital Leases
candidates.why: Contains capital leases, which should be excluded in baseline STD.
Potential short-term debt label but no visible values and less clear than explicit current interest-bearing liabilities.

variables.notes: R:c. Chose the explicit current interest-bearing liabilities line. Excluded lease liabilities per rule and avoided selecting overlapping maturity/component rows.

candidates.why: Direct match for taxes payable/current tax liability.
Best balance sheet match for property, plant and equipment; appears to be total/net tangible fixed assets.
Gross PP&E label but no visible values and gross is less preferred than total/net PPE.

candidates.row_label: Plant and Equipment, Net - Balancing value
candidates.why: PPE-related but balancing value line, less preferred than explicit reported total tangible fixed assets.

variables.notes: Preferred reported total/net tangible fixed assets as PPE proxy.

candidates.why: Direct match for total assets.

candidates.row_label: Net cash flow from operating activities
candidates.why: Direct match for operating cash flow / net cash from operating activities.

candidates.row_label: Other adjustments to operating cash flow
candidates.why: Adjustment line within CFO reconciliation, not the net operating cash flow total.

final_choice.row_label: Net cash flow from operating activities

variables.notes: Selected the explicit net operating cash flow total.
